name: React Webpack Redux Jest Starter
description: A React starter template with a custom Webpack setup, Redux for state management, and integrated testing using Jest and Enzyme, along with modern tooling for scalable frontend development.
features: React setup with custom Webpack configuration
Webpack configured for development and production builds
Babel transpilation for modern JavaScript (ES6+) support
Linting with ESLint and formatting with Prettier
Code coverage and reporting with Code Climate and Travis CI
Sample Redux actions and reducers included
